Careers
Work With Us

Teamwork, collaboration and transparency are the keys to our success, and our employees are our greatest assets. We strive to create a working environment where every team member is valued and respected, and where personal and professional growth is encouraged.

Our employees enjoy a range of benefits, including competitive salaries, flexible work schedules, and opportunities for career advancement. If you are looking for a challenging and rewarding career in the field of vacuum microwave dehydration, we would love to hear from you!

Interested in working with us? Send us your resume
We’re always looking for people to join us in the following departments.
01
Research & Development
Analyze market trends and innovate new products. The R&D team helps our partners and potential partners unlock new product opportunities with REV™ technology.
02
Sales & Marketing
Drive the company forward by communicating the value or REV™ technology. This team creates strong global relationships and ensures EnWave’s partners and potential partners are supported for the long term.
03
Operations
Create operational efficiencies and support the fabrication process and facilities management. The operations team manages supply chain, logistics, procurement, and product delivery.
04
Finance
